parameters.query: SELECT id, status, payload FROM quotes WHERE id = $1 LIMIT 1;
UPDATE quotes SET status = $2, payload = $3::jsonb WHERE id = $1 RETURNING id, status, payload;

parameters.jsCode:
const r = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { ok: true, quoteId: r.id, status: r.status, payload: r.payload, history: r.payload?.history || [] } }];
